title: ANC - 4.-ANC is ON and its value is either Adaptive or Standard and User doesn’t change value during call when Transparency is OFF without selected values
scenario: ANC remains ON and Transparency Mode is greyed out during a call, then returns to normal after call ends
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → ANC.
3. Set ANC to Adaptive or Standard mode.
4. Ensure Transparency Mode is OFF with no value selected.
5. Initiate or receive a call on the connected device.
6. During the call, observe the ANC setting in Audio Settings.
7. Check that Transparency Mode is greyed out and inaccessible.
8. Tap on Transparency Mode and observe the popup message.
10. After the call ends, navigate to Audio Settings → ANC and verify ANC remains ON with the previously selected value (Adaptive or Standard).
11. Verify Transparency Mode remains OFF with no value selected.
12. Attempt to toggle between ANC and Transparency modes normally.
expected: During the call, ANC remains ON with the previously selected option (Adaptive or Standard). Transparency Mode is greyed out and inaccessible. Tapping Transparency Mode shows a popup indicating the option is unavailable during a call. After the call ends, ANC remains ON with the previously selected value, Transparency Mode remains OFF with no value selected, and the user can toggle between ANC and Transparency modes normally.
